sentences.target: J'éclaire le chemin avec ma lampe de poche.
sentences.reading: /ʒe.klɛʁ lə ʃə.mɛ̃ avɛk ma lɑ̃p də pɔʃ/

translations.fr: J'éclaire le chemin avec ma lampe de poche.
translations.ipa: /ʒe.klɛʁ lə ʃə.mɛ̃ avɛk ma lɑ̃p də pɔʃ/
translations.en: I light the path with my flashlight.
translations.es: Ilumino el camino con mi linterna.
translations.de: Ich beleuchte den Weg mit meiner Taschenlampe.
translations.it: Illumino il sentiero con la mia torcia.
translations.pt: Eu ilumino o caminho com a minha lanterna.
translations.he: אני מאיר את השביל עם הפנס שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi chiếu sáng con đường bằng đèn pin của mình.
translations.nl: Ik verlicht het pad met mijn zaklamp.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी टॉर्च से रास्ता रोशन करता हूँ.
translations.el: Φωτίζω το μονοπάτι με τον φακό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg lyser opp stien med lommelykten min.
translations.id: Saya menerangi jalan dengan senter saya.
translations.sv: Jag lyser upp stigen med min ficklampa.
translations.da: Jeg lyser stien op med min lommelygte.
translations.ja: 懐中電灯で道を照らします。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel-initial verb; grammatical subject of the verb 'éclaire'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'le chemin' as direct object and 'avec ma lampe de poche' as an instrumental prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the direct object noun 'chemin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'éclaire'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental prepositional phrase ('avec ma lampe de poche').
Possessive determiner for 1st person singular possessor; feminine singular agreeing with 'lampe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase governed by 'avec'.
Preposition marking a noun complement; links 'poche' to 'lampe' to form a compound noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de' specifying the type of lamp ('lampe de poche' as a lexicalized compound).

sentences.target: Tu éclaires la carte s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty e.klɛʁ la kaʁt sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu éclaires la carte s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty e.klɛʁ la kaʁt sil tə plɛ/
translations.vi: Làm ơn chiếu sáng tấm bản đồ.
translations.ja: 地図を照らしてください。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of 'éclaires'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'la carte' as its direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the direct object noun 'carte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'éclaires'.
Elided subordinating conjunction 'si' before 'il'; introduces the polite formula 's'il te plaît' functioning as a discourse-pragmatic tag.
Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'plaît' in the formula 's'il te plaît' ('if it pleases you').
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular (dative); indirect object of 'plaît' in the polite expression.
Verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the set phrase 's'il te plaît' used to soften a request.

sentences.target: La lampe sert à éclairer la plante.
sentences.reading: /la lɑ̃p sɛʁ a e.klɛ.ʁe la plɑ̃t/

translations.fr: La lampe sert à éclairer la plante.
translations.ipa: /la lɑ̃p sɛʁ a e.klɛ.ʁe la plɑ̃t/
translations.en: The lamp is for lighting the plant.
translations.es: La lámpara sirve para iluminar la planta.
translations.de: Die Lampe ist dazu da, die Pflanze zu beleuchten.
translations.it: La lampada serve a illuminare la pianta.
translations.yue: 呢盞燈係用嚟照嗰棵植物。
translations.pt: A lâmpada serve para iluminar a planta.
translations.vi: Cái đèn dùng để chiếu sáng cây.
translations.nl: De lamp is bedoeld om de plant te verlichten.
translations.hu: A lámpa a növény megvilágítására szolgál.
translations.hi: लैंप पौधे को रोशन करने के लिए है.
translations.el: Η λάμπα χρησιμεύει για να φωτίζει το φυτό.
translations.nb: Lampen er til for å lyse opp planten.
translations.sv: Lampan är till för att lysa upp växten.
translations.ro: Lampa este pentru a ilumina planta.
translations.da: Lampen er til for at lyse planten op.
translations.ja: ランプは植物を照らすためのものです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the subject noun 'lampe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of 'sert'.
Verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional infinitive complement with 'à' to express purpose.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement ('à éclairer') that expresses purpose.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'à'; transitive, taking 'la plante' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the direct object noun 'plante'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'éclairer'.

sentences.target: Nous éclairons la scène pendant la répétition.
sentences.reading: /nu z‿e.klɛ.ʁɔ̃ la sɛn pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.pe.ti.sjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous éclairons la scène pendant la répétition.
translations.ipa: /nu z‿e.klɛ.ʁɔ̃ la sɛn pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.pe.ti.sjɔ̃/
translations.en: We light the stage during rehearsal.
translations.es: Iluminamos el escenario durante el ensayo.
translations.de: Wir beleuchten die Bühne während der Probe.
translations.it: Illuminiamo il palco durante le prove.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在排练时给舞台打光。
translations.yue: 我哋喺排練時照住個舞台。
translations.ru: Мы освещаем сцену во время репетиции.
translations.pt: Nós iluminamos o palco durante o ensaio.
translations.he: אנחנו מאירים את הבמה בזמן החזרה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chiếu sáng sân khấu trong lúc diễn tập.
translations.nl: We lichten het podium uit tijdens de repetitie.
translations.uk: Ми освітлюємо сцену під час репетиції.
translations.hi: हम रिहर्सल के दौरान मंच को रोशन करते हैं.
translations.el: Φωτίζουμε τη σκηνή κατά τη διάρκεια της πρόβας.
translations.nb: Vi lyser opp scenen under prøven.
translations.sv: Vi lyser upp scenen under repetitionen.
translations.da: Vi lyser scenen op under prøven.
translations.ja: 私たちはリハーサル中に舞台を照らします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject of 'éclairons'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'la scène' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the direct object noun 'scène'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'éclairons'.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('pendant la répétition').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'répétition' within the temporal PP.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pendant', specifying the time frame.
